title: S26 closeout and research-readiness memo

branch_summary.rule_digest: long-only; close>EMA200 AND EMA50>EMA200; low<=20-day rolling low(excl current)+1.5*ATR20; 40<=RSI14<=55 AND (RSI14[i]>RSI14[i-1] OR close>EMA20); fill next-bar open; stop=entry-2*ATR20 (1R=2N); target +2R; EMA50 close-break backstop; exit precedence stop->target->ema50_break; one position, flat-state entries only

donchian_parked.S23: WATCH (IS+OOS positive but OOS n=16 too small -> not deployable)
donchian_parked.S24: ENTRY_EDGE_NOT_SUPPORTED (breakout entries fire after extended move; NO_EDGE all horizons IS & OOS)
donchian_parked.S25: SEQUENCE_RISK_FRAGILE (removing top-3 flips IS -3.82R and OOS -1.93R negative; OOS best trade 50.3% of net)

design_responses: pullback/retest toward support instead of breakout-only entry -> less winner dependence
capped +2R target distributes outcomes (anti single-winner dependence)
min trade thresholds (IS>=40, OOS>=30) to avoid Donchian's low-OOS-n WATCH

evidence_chain.D1: spec pre-registered (hypothesis + fixed rules + ladder + gates)
evidence_chain.D2: engine + unit tests committed in new files (Donchian source untouched)
evidence_chain.D4: sealed OOS protocol pre-registered and committed before any OOS run
evidence_chain.D5: OOS 2023-2025 run once -> PASS (all 8 gates met, no WATCH/FAIL)
evidence_chain.D11: multi-market data provisioned (ES/MES/MNQ from Databento) -> DATA_PROVISIONED

final_s26_verdict: S26 is the strongest candidate so far.
S26 should continue validation, but only under strict guardrails.
main_weaknesses: IS expectancy is thin (+0.0654R/trade; PF 1.20 marginal).
IS max DD (10.59R) is high relative to total R (7.65R).
Entry significance is inconclusive (no EDGE_LIKELY horizon on IS).
ES IS max DD (16.73R) is high and exceeds 1.5x NQ IS DD.
ES OOS has only 27 trades (<30) and is 2025-dominated (72.8% of net).
Multi-market support is partial, not robust.
Only one independent extra market beyond NQ (the S&P via ES).

correct_next_steps.what: formal risk/readiness gate design, still no paper trading
regime breakdown across NQ and ES
execution realism / slippage and commission stress
only after those, consider a separate paper-readiness memo

forbidden_next_steps: Do not add filters based on OOS.
Do not market it as a profitable bot.
Do not mix this with Donchian.
final_line: S26 remains a research candidate with partial independent support, not a deployable trading system.
